Entry.JapaneseText: 残念ながら不採用です。 今回のわたしの想定メンバーに “桃色”は含まれていないの
Entry.EnglishText: Unfortunately, I have to say no. My current team members don't include anyone wearing "Pink".

Entry.JapaneseText: なんでよ？ べつにいいでしょ、一人くらい増えても！
Entry.EnglishText: Why not? Adding just one extra person should be fine!

Entry.JapaneseText: だめだよ、６人なんてバランスが悪すぎる！ ポーズとか決めにくいじゃないか！
Entry.EnglishText: We can't! Six people would make it way too unbalanced! It'll be too hard to decide on poses!

Entry.JapaneseText: さすがカイル。 よくわかってくれてる
Entry.EnglishText: Just like I'd expect from you, Kyle. You understand this so well.

Entry.JapaneseText: ケンカすんなって。 じゃあ今回おれは遠慮するよ。 代わりにルビアを入れてやってくれ
Entry.EnglishText: Don't fight, guys. Since that's how it is, I'll step back on this one. You can swap me out with Rubia.

Entry.JapaneseText: それではだめ。 わたしは“桃色”なんていらない。 欲しいのは“緑”なの
Entry.EnglishText: That's no good, either. I don't need "Pink". I need "Green".

Entry.JapaneseText: もう頭にきたわ！ だったら力ずくでも メンバー入りしてやるんだから！
Entry.EnglishText: Okay, now I'm mad! In that case, I'll make myself a member through brute force!
